applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Pre-transposed attention matmul for decode (seq_len=1). Replaces the torch subsequence: transpose batch/q-len dims, batched matmul against per-user K^T (or V), transpose back. Used for Q@K^T (pre-softmax) and attn_weights@V (post-softmax) in decode-mode attention. input_a: [q_len(=1), q_heads, batch, head_dim], input_b: [batch, 1, head_dim, kv_len].; constraints: {'dtype': 'output dtype must be BFLOAT16 (per model call-site comments)', 'q_len': 1, 'arch_condition': 'selected when is_wormhole_b0(); otherwise group_attn_matmul is used for multi-q-head/GQA cases', 'kv_heads': 'input_b heads dim must be 1 (single KV head); use group_attn_matmul for grouped heads'}

placement_observations.source: model call site: memory_config=self.model_config['PRE_SOFTMAX_MM_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] (Falcon decode config, L1 interleaved); dtype=model_config['PRE_SOFTMAX_MM_OUTPUT_DTYPE'] with comment 'Must be BFLOAT16'

model call site: memory_config=self.model_config['POST_SOFTMAX_MM_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] (Falcon decode config, L1 interleaved); dtype=model_config['POST_SOFTMAX_MM_OUTPUT_DTYPE'] with comment 'Must be BFLOAT16'

model call site: query_layer.deallocate() immediately after op indicates short-lived L1-resident activation; grid taken from full device grid (mesh_device.compute_with_storage_grid_size() or self.core_grid)
